info.name: GCS FARM API
info.description:
API do GCS FARM (gcs-backend). 28 modulos, 206 endpoints.

Variaveis: {{baseUrl}} (default http://localhost:3000) e {{token}} (JWT).
Fluxo: POST /auth/login -> copie o token -> cole em {{token}}. Os demais modulos herdam Bearer {{token}}.
Gerado automaticamente a partir das rotas Express do backend.
